Notice And Motion To Enforce The Written Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. SHAWN K. BANKSON OF KIMBALL, TIREY & ST. JOHN, TEL. NO. (925) 469-1690 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND OPPOSING PARTY;
ATTY. COREY W. PARSON OF PILLSBURY, WINTHROP, SHAW AND PITTMAN, TEL. NO. 983-1000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BRIGADO GROVES.

RULING- A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT BRIGARDO GROVES' Motion To Enforce The Written Settlement Agreement is denied. Defendant has failed to carry his burden of proving he has not violated the stipulation of settlement. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189 =(301/PJB/JF)
